name: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-54-80W
title: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-54-80W
title_extended: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-54-80W – 54V, 80W, 1.5A, Gigabit Ethernet Port, Surge Protection

detailed_description.heading: High-Power PoE Injector for Demanding Applications
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti POE-54V-80W is a specialized EdgePoint PoE Injector, engineered to deliver high-voltage power and data connectivity to PoE-enabled devices. The POE-54V-80W is specifically tailored to support devices that require require a 54V power supply, making it ideal for high-performance network applications.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
• Surge protection
• Clamping protection
• Maximum surge discharge
• Peak pulse current
• AC cable with earth ground

detailed_description.heading: High Power Output and Gigabit Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The POE-54V-80W injector provides a high output of 54V DC with a current of 1.5A, resulting in a total power capacity of 80 watts. This significant power output is essential for supporting power-intensive devices like high-capacity wireless backhauls, advanced security systems, and other critical network equipment that operate beyond the typical power range of standard PoE solutions. Equipped with a Gigabit Ethernet port, the POE-54V-80W ensures that it does not become a bottleneck in data transfer speeds. This capability is crucial for maintaining optimal performance in networks that handle large volumes of data or require high-speed connectivity for applications like video surveillance or high-throughput wireless communications.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Safety Features and Certifications
detailed_description.text: This model includes advanced safety features such as over-voltage, over-current, and surge protection. These protections are vital for preventing damage to connected devices and ensuring continuous operation, even in unstable or fluctuating power conditions. The POE-54V-80W's comprehensive protective measures make it a safe choice for critical network infrastructure. In addition, the Ubiquiti POE-54V-80W holds certifications from CE, FCC, and IC, demonstrating compliance with strict safety and operational standards. These certifications affirm its quality and reliability for professional deployments.
